name: Yuuri Kellerman
description:
A psychic expert appearing in episode 9.

He was a guest on a news channel hosted by Tom Wiles when mysterious land graffiti was reported being from attack satellites. Kellerman was convinced that aliens were responsible, either by manipulating the satellites themselves or by influencing people's minds. Either way, according to him aliens were responsible.

His name is a parody on the famous psychic Uri Geller.

(Source: Cowboy Bebop Fandom)
